name: Country Breakfast (Kraft)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded cheddar cheese (cracker barrel brand)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook potatoes, green pepper, and onion in margarine until lightly browned.
2. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
3. Break eggs over the potato mixture.
4. Cover and cook until the eggs are done.
5. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese (cracker barrel brand).
6. Cover and heat until the cheese melts.
